(C2D) None of Above Communication Devices CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: communication devices/techniques - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
142 C3A C3A_SPEECH (C3A) Speech CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: modes of expression - speech. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
